title: Senior Software Engineer - HP India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - HP India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
HP India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HP India:
HP India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India!
